verse_text: So they brought in the ark of God and set it in the midst of the tent David had pitched for it. They offered up whole burnt offerings and peace offerings before God.

pericope.title: The Ark Is Moved to Jerusalem

links.context: Cakes of raisins were given to the people of Israel after King David completed the burnt offerings and peace offerings to God before the ark of the covenant (2Kg 6:16-19; [[1CH.16:1]]-3, NKJV). They, together with the apples, symbolize the sweetness of God's grace bestowed on believers.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
